Democracy you can see

Your city. Your voice. Your power.

Civitro brings transparency to Indian governance. Track civic issues, rate your leaders, and participate in building the India you want to see.

Cities Covered

Everything you need for civic engagement

A complete platform to bridge the gap between citizens and government.

Track Issues

Report civic issues and track them through a transparent 6-step ledger from reporting to citizen verification.

Rate Leaders

Evaluate your elected representatives on accessibility, responsiveness, transparency, and delivery.

Civic Health Index

Every constituency gets a data-driven CHI score. See how your area compares at a glance.

Participate in Polls

Vote on issues that matter to your community. Your voice shapes local governance decisions.

Raise Your Voice

Share opinions, suggestions, and feedback. Engage in constructive civic discourse.

Promise Tracker

Hold leaders accountable by tracking their promises and verifying their delivery.

Ready to make democracy transparent?

Join thousands of citizens across India who are already using Civitro to hold their leaders accountable.

Get Started Free
